ruleset.name: CiviKitchen
ruleset.description:
Opinionated phpcs standard for CiviCRM extensions, shipped in the civikitchen image. It is CiviCRM's Drupal base MINUS the doc-comment sniffs that fight modern PHPStan array-shape / generic PHPDocs (which PHPStan validates far more precisely), PLUS reusable footgun sniffs: NoLegacyCall (no APIv3 entry points, no CRM_Utils_Array::value / PEAR::raiseError / CRM_Core_Error::fatal|debug_*), UseExtensionTs (bare ts() resolves in core's translation domain — extensions must use E::ts()) and NoRequiredOnExternalAction (the @required trap — inert until an extension lists its externally reachable actions).
Use it directly (`phpcs --standard=CiviKitchen` / `cklint`) or reference it from a project phpcs.xml.dist (``) and add project-specific paths, config and sniffs on top — the per-extension layer is always yours.
